---
title: "Messaging App"
subtitle: "Full Stack"
description: "Web-based messaging app where authenticated users can chat one-one by sending and receiving messages and files."
author: Abdullah Zeeshan
date: 2024-12-05
image: ../utils/messaging-app.png
categories:
  - Node.js
  - Express
  - PostgreSQL
  - Prisma ORM
  - REST API
  - JWT
  - Passport
  - React
  - Tailwind
reading-time: true
toc: true
fig-align: center
fig-cap-location: bottom
banner: true
---

<span class="listing-btn-group">
<a href="https://messaging-app-frontend-dusky.vercel.app/" class="btn" role="button">{{< fa globe >}} Live</a> 
<a href="https://github.com/4bdullah7eeshan/messaging-app-backend" class="btn" role="button">{{< iconify fa github >}} Backend</a>
<a href="https://github.com/4bdullah7eeshan/messaging-app-frontend" class="btn" role="button">{{< iconify fa github >}} Frontend</a>
</span>

::: {.callout-note}
Project Description will be added soon.
:::
